description: `tan 90` is mathematically undefined (cosine is 0 there) and raises the dedicated `ol-tan-undefined` (issue #323, spec PR #392 — a per-domain educational code mirroring `ol-neg-sqrt`, not a reuse of `ol-div-zero`) instead of returning a huge finite double, NaN, or Infinity. Execution halts at the failing statement, so no `print` event is emitted.
